description: Letter from Sahlān b. Avraham to a Ḥaver. Dating: ca. 1035. Mentions Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAllūn. (Information from Gil, Palestine, vol. 2 p. 622-623, #339). Goitein summarizes this as follows: "Fragment. According to the request of a Gaon, the scribe of a court deposition restates the contents of that deposition (probably lost), which was against the interest of a certain ḥaver. The letter is addressed to that ḥaver. Preserved is the name of Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAllūn, who was granted a power of attorney." VMR
description_he: מכתב מסהלאן בן אברהם לחבר, בערך 1035. מזכיר אבו אל-חסן עלון.
